Title: Unisex Pocket Logo T-Shirt in Sage Green with Minimal Botanical Print
Description:
Elevate your casual wardrobe with this perfectly tailored, comfortable pocket logo tee. Featuring a subtle, nature-inspired graphic on the chest, this shirt embodies the effortless simplicity of modern, minimalist style. It's the perfect blend of comfort and subtle design detailing, making it an instant go-to piece.

  • Ultimate Comfort: Crafted from soft, breathable fabric that feels great all day long, ensuring maximum wearability.
  • Versatile Design: The muted sage green hue and clean, small-scale botanical print offer a sophisticated pop of color without being overwhelming.
  • Thoughtful Detail: The classic pocket placement adds a touch of structure and tailored style to this basic silhouette.

Ideal for everyday errands, relaxed weekends, or pairing with denim for a polished casual look. Whether you are looking for a stylish piece for yourself or a thoughtful, universally flattering gift, this t-shirt delivers comfort and subtle style that works for every season and occasion.
